productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Agora Black Sports Shoes
description: Take training to the next level in these Agora shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these shoes help you train longer and better. Team these with jeans and tees for great urban style.UpperSynthetic woven uppers for better structure and comfortAdidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performance Mesh tongue provides better breathabilityPadded collar offers better comfortLace-up system for a snug, customized FitBrand name embossed on the tongue and embroidered behind the collarHaul loop on the collar for easy handlingMidsoleCushioned footbed provides all day comfortEVA midsole provides better shock absorption and cushioningOutsoleAggressive TPR oursole comprised of mutlidirectional lugs on the forefoot, heel and periphery of the foot for better gripOutsole extends and builds up to the sides, heel and forefoot to give better grip and protection on all sidesReinforced midfoot arch for better arch supportshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
